ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the simulation output file */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy value of the simulation result */,
  "total_force" REAL /* Total force of the simulation result */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the simulation */,
  "research_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research group responsible for the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was performed */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Name of the simulation software used */,
  "input_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary input file used in the simulation (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_research_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("research_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_input_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_file_id") REFERENCES input_files ("input_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation result the parameter belongs to */,
  "ecut" INTEGER /* Energy cutoff value of the simulation */,
  "nkpts" INTEGER /* Number of k-points used in the simulation */,
  "alat" REAL /* Lattice constant value of the simulation */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used in the simulation */,
  "magnetic_moments" TEXT /* Magnetic moments of the atoms in the simulation */,
  "pseudopotential" TEXT /* Type of pseudopotential used */,
  "kpoint_grid" TEXT /* Detailed k-point grid used in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "research_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leader of the research group */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the research group */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the research group was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_groups_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_files" (
  "input_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the input file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the input file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the input file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the input file (e.g., .in, .dat) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the input file was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the input file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_input_files" (
  "simulation_input_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation-input file relationship */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the input file belongs to */,
  "input_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input file used for the simulation */,
  "input_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the input files were used in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_input_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_input_files_input_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_file_id") REFERENCES input_files ("input_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_input_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., department, institution) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
